---
title: "IPMH: Integration of stepped care for perinatal mood and anxiety disorders among women attending MCH clinics"

subtitle: 'Data and Safety Monitoring Board (DSMB): Closed Report '
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
header-includes:
 \usepackage{float}
 \usepackage{booktabs}
 \usepackage{longtable}
 \usepackage{array}
 \usepackage{multirow}
 \usepackage[table]{xcolor}
 \usepackage{wrapfig}
 \floatplacement{figure}{H}
 \usepackage[normalem]{ulem}
output:
    pdf_document:
        latex_engine: xelatex
    word_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = FALSE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE
)

rm(list = ls())

# Set up data freeze time for this report
data_freeze <- as.Date("2026-04-23") 

#data_freeze <- "2026-05-11"
##### NOTES: Need to replace this with May 11 2026, which is the date of data freeze for this report after May 11 2026. #####

# Reference source codes & other dependencies:
source("DataTeam_ipmh.R")
source("Dependencies.R")
source("data_import.R")

# reading in additional needed dataframes
telepsych <- read.csv(paste0(ipmh_filepath,"/Data/7. RCT admin data/Telepsych_", data_freeze,".csv"))
rct_ppw_consenting <- read.csv(paste0(ipmh_filepath,"/Data/2. Consenting database/RCT_PPW_consenting_",
                                      data_freeze,".csv"))

```


```{r logo,  out.width = "100%", echo=FALSE, eval = T, fig.height=4, fig.width=4}

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(file.path(ipmh_filepath, "/Data/IPMH logo.jpg")))

```

\newpage

John Kinuthia, MBChD, MMed, MPH, Kenyatta National Hospital

Keshet Ronen, PhD, MPH, University of Washington

Amritha Bhat, MBBS, MD, MPH, University of Washington

Report prepared by: David Owaga & Yuwei Wang

Date of data freeze: `r format(data_freeze, '%d %B %Y')`

\newpage

\tableofcontents

\newpage

# 1. Study Summary

```{r study_summary}
vars <- c("Primary Objective", "Study Design", "Study Population", "Inclusion Criteria",
         "Target Sample Size",
         "Actual Enrollment",
         "Participants Completed Follow-up", "Duration", 
         "Date Study Open", "Date of First Complete Enrollment",
         "Estimated End of Study",
         "Endpoints", "")

vars2 <- c("Integrate IPMH, a stepped care intervention for screening and treatment of perinatal mood and anxiety disorders (PMADs), and its implementation strategies, into maternal and child health clinics and pragmatically evaluate its clinical, service delivery, and implementation outcomes",
          "A 2-arm, non-blinded cluster randomized controlled trial (RCT) comparing the effect of IPMH and associated implementation strategies on depression, anxiety, quality of life, and adverse perinatal outcomes vs. control (standard of care) among Kenyan women", 
          "Pregnant Kenyan women", 
          "-Receiving antenatal care at study facility\n->=20 weeks gestation\n-Age>=14\n-screen positive for PMAD symptoms (PHQ-2>=3 and/or GAD-2>=3)", 
          "2970, including 405 women living with HIV (WLWH)", 
          "[place holder]",
          "[place holder]",
          "Follow-up through 6 months postpartum", 
          "September 19, 2023", 
          "February 17, 2025",
          "July 31, 2028",
          "Primary: Depression (Patient Health Questionnaire-9 [PHQ-9] score) and anxiety (Generalized Anxiety Disorder-7 [GAD-7] score)", 
          "Secondary:\n-Problem Management Plus (PM+) Skill Acquisition (Reducing Tension Checklist score)\n-Quality of Life (World Health Organization Quality of Life [WHOQOL-BREF] score)\n-Any adverse pregnancy outcome")

stdy_summ <- data.frame(vars, vars2)

study_summary <- flextable(stdy_summ)
study_summary <- flextable::width(study_summary, 'vars2', width = 5)
study_summary <- flextable::width(study_summary, 'vars', width = 2)
border <- fp_border()
study_summary <- flextable::vline(study_summary, j = c('vars'), border = border, part = "all")
study_summary <- set_header_labels(study_summary, vars = "Title", vars2 = "IPMH: Integration of stepped care for perinatal mood and anxiety disorders among women attending MCH clinics")

study_summary
```

\newpage

# 2. Study Enrollment

```{r Consort data prep, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ANC Attendees ----------------------------------------------------------
Attendees <- daily_closeout_df %>%
    summarise(anc_attendees = sum(rct_anc_number, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    pull(anc_attendees)

anc_attendees_df <- data.frame(
    anc_id        = paste0("anc_", seq_len(Attendees)),
    anc_attendees = "Yes"  # rep() unnecessary for a single scalar
)

# PM+ Survey participants -------------------------------------------------
pm_df <- pm_survey_df %>%
    mutate(pm_ptid = as.numeric(pm_ptid)) %>%
    filter(ipmh_participant == "Yes") %>%
    distinct(pm_ptid, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(pm_ptid, ipmh_participant)

# Telepsychiatry ----------------------------------------------------------
tele_with_id <- telepsych %>%
    filter(tele_ancid != "2025-03-0092") %>%      
    arrange(tele_ancid, tele_date) %>%
    group_by(tele_ancid) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    left_join(
        rct_ppw_consenting %>% select(anc_num, partipant_id),
        by = c("tele_ancid" = "anc_num")
    ) %>%
    select(tele_ancid, partipant_id) %>%
    mutate(tele = "Yes")

tele_sessions <- nrow(tele_with_id)

# Follow-up visits --------------------------------------------------------
# Collapsed three near-identical blocks into a single reusable function
make_visit <- function(df, visit_label, new_col) {
    df %>%
        filter(clt_visit == visit_label) %>%
        select(clt_ptid) %>%
        mutate(!!new_col := "Yes")
}

secondvisit <- make_visit(ppw_rct_df, "6 weeks post-partum",   "secondvisit")
thirdvisit  <- make_visit(ppw_rct_df, "14 weeks post-partum",  "thirdvisit")
fourthvisit <- make_visit(ppw_rct_df, "6 months post-partum",  "fourthvisit")

# CONSORT data assembly ---------------------------------------------------
consort_data <- screening_consent_df %>%
    select(record_id, partipant_id, rct_harm_thought, rct_aud_hallucinations,
           rct_vis_hallucinations, rct_paranoia, rct_delusions,
           rct_memory_problem, rct_eligible_gestation, rct_eligible_harm,
           rct_risk, rct_eligible, rct_enrolling, rct_decline_reason,
           rct_other_reasons) %>%
    mutate(
        eligible = if_else(rct_eligible == 1, "1", NA_character_),

        exclusion = case_when(
            rct_eligible == 0 & rct_eligible_gestation == "No"  ~ "Gestation <20 Weeks",
            rct_harm_thought == "Yes" & rct_memory_problem == "No"  ~ "Self harm",
            rct_harm_thought == "Yes" & rct_memory_problem == "Yes" ~ "Self harm and memory problem",
            rct_eligible == 0 & rct_aud_hallucinations == "Yes"     ~ "Hearing voices that others cannot hear",
            rct_eligible == 0 & rct_vis_hallucinations == "Yes"     ~ "Seeing things that others cannot see",
            rct_memory_problem == "Yes" ~ "Memory problem",
            rct_delusions == "Yes"      ~ "Holding unusual beliefs",
            rct_paranoia == "Yes"       ~ "Feels watched/followed",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
        ),
        # Clear exclusion for low/moderate-risk self-harm among eligible
        exclusion = if_else(
            eligible == "1" & exclusion == "Self harm" & rct_risk %in% c("Low", "Moderate"),
            NA_character_, exclusion
        ),

        facility = as.numeric(str_sub(partipant_id, 3, 4)),

        arm = if_else(
            facility %in% c(2, 5, 6, 8, 11, 14, 15, 18, 20, 21),
            "Control", "Intervention"
        ),

        rct_decline_reason = if_else(
            rct_decline_reason == "Other (specify) ___",
            "Relocate post delivery", rct_decline_reason
        )
    ) %>%
    # All joins chained together
    left_join(pm_df,        by = c("partipant_id" = "pm_ptid")) %>%
    left_join(secondvisit,  by = c("partipant_id" = "clt_ptid")) %>%
    left_join(thirdvisit,   by = c("partipant_id" = "clt_ptid")) %>%
    left_join(fourthvisit,  by = c("partipant_id" = "clt_ptid")) %>%
    left_join(tele_with_id, by = "partipant_id")

# Prepend ANC attendees row
consort_data <- bind_rows(anc_attendees_df, consort_data)
```

```{r generate dummy arm, echo=FALSE}
# ---- Random arm assignment at facility level ----
set.seed(12345)

facility_arms <- consort_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(facility)) %>%
    distinct(facility) %>%
    arrange(facility) %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = sample(rep(c("Intervention (Randomized)",
                                  "Control (Randomized)"), each = 10))
    )

consort_data <- consort_data %>%
    left_join(facility_arms, by = "facility") %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = factor(arm_random,
                            levels = c("Control (Randomized)",
                                       "Intervention (Randomized)"))
    )

# NOTE FOR WENWEN: Replace all arm_random with arm in the consort diagram chunk below to switch from dummy to real arm assignment.
```

```{r consort diagram, echo=FALSE, fig.height=10, fig.width=15, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Helper: percentage-formatted label -----------------------------------------
generate_stage_text <- function(label, n, denom, decimals = 2) {
    pct <- if_else(denom > 0, (n / denom) * 100, 0)
    sprintf("%s\n (n=%d, %.*f%%)", label, n, decimals, pct)
}

generate_box_header <- function(label, n, denom, decimals = 2) {
    pct <- if_else(denom > 0, (n / denom) * 100, 0)
    sprintf("%s (n=%d, %.*f%%):", label, n, decimals, pct)
}

# Counts by arm --------------------------------------------------------------
counts_by_arm <- consort_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(arm_random)) %>%
    group_by(arm_random) %>%
    summarise(
        assessed         = n(),
        excluded         = sum(!is.na(exclusion)),
        eligible         = sum(eligible == "1", na.rm = TRUE),
        enrolled         = sum(rct_enrolling == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        pm_participants  = sum(ipmh_participant == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        tele_participants = sum(tele == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        postpartum_visit  = sum(secondvisit == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        postpartum_visit1 = sum(thirdvisit  == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        postpartum_visit2 = sum(fourthvisit == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
        txt_eligible   = generate_stage_text("Eligible",                  eligible,          assessed),
        txt_excluded   = generate_stage_text("Excluded",                  excluded,          assessed),
        txt_enrolled   = generate_stage_text("Enrolled",                  enrolled,          eligible),
        txt_pm         = generate_stage_text("PM+",                       pm_participants,   enrolled),
        txt_tele       = generate_stage_text("Telepsychiatry",            tele_participants, enrolled),
        txt_postpartum = generate_stage_text("6 weeks postpartum visit",  postpartum_visit,  enrolled),
        txt_postpartum1= generate_stage_text("14 weeks postpartum visit", postpartum_visit1, enrolled),
        txt_postpartum2= generate_stage_text("6 months postpartum visit", postpartum_visit2, enrolled),
        txt_pm_tele    = paste(txt_pm, txt_tele, sep = "\n")
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

# Top-level labels -----------------------------------------------------------
n_attendees <- sum(consort_data$anc_attendees == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
n_assessed  <- sum(!is.na(consort_data$arm), na.rm = TRUE)

txt_anc <- sprintf("ANC Attendees (n=%d)", n_attendees)
txt_ass <- sprintf("Assessed for Eligibility\n (n=%d, %.1f%%)",
                   n_assessed, (n_assessed / n_attendees) * 100)

txt_arm <- counts_by_arm %>%
    mutate(txt = sprintf("%s\n (n=%d, %.1f%%)",
                         arm_random, assessed, (assessed / n_assessed) * 100)) %>%
    pull(txt)

# Side box builder -----------------------------------------------------------
make_side_box <- function(data, group_var, reason_var, count_var,
                          header_fn, n_col, denom_col) {
    data %>%
        group_split(arm_random) %>%
        lapply(function(df) {
            n      <- unique(df[[n_col]])
            denom  <- unique(df[[denom_col]])
            header <- header_fn(n, denom)
            bullets <- sprintf("\u2022 %s (n=%d, %.1f%%)",
                               df[[reason_var]], df[[count_var]],
                               (df[[count_var]] / n) * 100)
            paste(c(header, bullets), collapse = "\n")
        }) %>%
        unlist()
}

# Exclusion side boxes -------------------------------------------------------
txt_ex <- consort_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(exclusion)) %>%
    group_by(arm_random, exclusion) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(counts_by_arm %>% select(arm_random, excluded, assessed),
              by = "arm_random") %>%
    make_side_box(
        reason_var = "exclusion", count_var = "count",
        header_fn  = function(n, d) generate_box_header("Excluded", n, d),
        n_col = "excluded", denom_col = "assessed"
    )

# Decline side boxes ---------------------------------------------------------
txt_decline <- consort_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(rct_decline_reason)) %>%
    group_by(arm_random, rct_decline_reason) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(
        counts_by_arm %>% mutate(declined = eligible - enrolled) %>%
            select(arm_random, declined, eligible),
        by = "arm_random"
    ) %>%
    make_side_box(
        reason_var = "rct_decline_reason", count_var = "count",
        header_fn  = function(n, d) sprintf("Declined Enrollment (n=%d, %.1f%%):", n, (n/d)*100),
        n_col = "declined", denom_col = "eligible"
    )

# CONSORT diagram ------------------------------------------------------------
consort_per <- add_box(txt = txt_anc) |>
    add_box(txt = txt_ass) |>
    add_split(txt = txt_arm) |>
    add_side_box(txt = txt_ex) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_eligible) |>
    add_side_box(txt = txt_decline) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_enrolled) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_postpartum) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_postpartum1) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_postpartum2)

consort_per
```

\newpage

## 2.1 Enrollment Progress - Overall

```{r enrollment_progress prep, echo=FALSE}
# Site label lookup (number ??? short name)
site_labels <- c(
    "01, Rwambwa Sub-county Hospital"     = "01, Rwambwa",
    "02, Sigomere Sub County Hospital"    = "02, Sigomere",
    "03, Uyawi Sub County Hospital"       = "03, Uyawi",
    "04, Got Agulu Sub-District Hospital" = "04, Got Agulu",
    "05, Ukwala Sub County Hospital"      = "05, Ukwala",
    "06, Madiany Sub County Hospital"     = "06, Madiany",
    "07, Kabondo Sub County Hospital"     = "07, Kabondo",
    "08, Mbita Sub-County Hospital"       = "08, Mbita",
    "09, Miriu Health Centre"             = "09, Miriu",
    "11, Nyandiwa Level IV Hospital"      = "11, Nyandiwa",
    "13, Ober Kamoth Sub County Hospital" = "13, Ober Kamoth",
    "14, Gita Sub County Hospital"        = "14, Gita",
    "15, Akala Health Centre"             = "15, Akala",
    "16, Usigu Health Centre"             = "16, Usigu",
    "17, Ramula Health Centre"            = "17, Ramula",
    "18, Simenya Health Centre"           = "18, Simenya",
    "19, Airport Health Centre (Kisumu)"  = "19, Airport",
    "20, Nyalenda Health Centre"          = "20, Nyalenda",
    "21, Mirogi Health Centre"            = "21, Mirogi",
    "22, Ndiru Level 4 Hospital"          = "22, Ndiru"
)

# Enrollment prep ??? collapsed into a single pipeline
weekly_enrollment <- screening_consent_df %>%
    filter(rct_enrolling == "Yes" | latest_consent == "Yes") %>%
    select(study_site, consent_date_auto, consent_date_auto_v2) %>%
    mutate(
        consent_date_auto = as.Date(
            coalesce(consent_date_auto, consent_date_auto_v2),
            origin = "1899-12-30"
        ),
        week      = floor_date(consent_date_auto, "week", week_start = 1),
        study_site = recode(study_site, !!!site_labels),
        arm        = str_extract(study_site, "^\\d{2}"),
        arm_group  = if_else(
            arm %in% c("02", "05", "06", "08", "11", "14", "15", "18", "20", "21"),
            "Control", "Intervention"
        )
    ) %>%
    select(-consent_date_auto_v2) %>%
    group_by(study_site, arm, arm_group, week) %>%
    summarise(enrollment_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    # Full join to fill in weeks with no enrollment
    full_join(
        data.frame(week = seq(as.Date("2025-02-16"), as.Date(data_freeze), by = "week")),
        by = "week"
    ) %>%
    arrange(week) %>%
    mutate(enrollment_count = replace_na(enrollment_count, 0)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(study_site)) %>%
    group_by(study_site) %>%
    mutate(cumulative_enrollment = cumsum(enrollment_count)) %>%
    ungroup()
```

```{r generate dummy arm2, echo=FALSE}
# ---- Random arm assignment at facility level ----
set.seed(12345)

facility_arms <- weekly_enrollment %>%
    filter(!is.na(study_site)) %>%
    distinct(study_site) %>%
    arrange(study_site) %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = sample(rep(c("Intervention (Randomized)",
                                  "Control (Randomized)"), each = 10))
    )

weekly_enrollment <- weekly_enrollment %>%
    left_join(facility_arms, by = "study_site") %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = factor(arm_random,
                            levels = c("Control (Randomized)",
                                       "Intervention (Randomized)"))
    )

# NOTE FOR WENWEN: Replace arm_random with arm_group throughout the plot chunk
# below to switch from dummy to real arm assignment.
```

```{r enrollment_progress plot, echo=FALSE, fig.height=10, fig.width=15, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Shared plot theme ---------------------------------------------------------
consort_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
        plot.title        = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1),
        strip.text        = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
        legend.position   = "right",
        legend.box        = "vertical",
        legend.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
        legend.text       = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.key.height = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        legend.key.width  = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        plot.margin       = margin(10, 20, 10, 10)
    )

total_enrollment <- weekly_enrollment %>%
    group_by(week, arm_random) %>%
    summarise(enrollment_count = sum(enrollment_count), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(week) %>%
    group_by(arm_random) %>%
    mutate(
        cumulative_enrollment = cumsum(enrollment_count),
        study_site = "Total"
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

combined_enrollment <- bind_rows(weekly_enrollment, total_enrollment) %>%
    mutate(is_total = study_site == "Total")

# Color palette: sites in default ggplot hues, "Total" in black
site_names  <- sort(unique(weekly_enrollment$study_site))
site_colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(site_names)), site_names)
all_colors  <- c(site_colors, "Total" = "black")

p1 <- ggplot(combined_enrollment,
             aes(x = week, y = cumulative_enrollment,
                 color = study_site, group = study_site,
                 linewidth = is_total)) +
    geom_line() +
    scale_linewidth_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 0.5, "TRUE" = 1.5), guide = "none") +
    # Target lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = 372,  linetype = "dashed", color = "red",       linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 743,  linetype = "dashed", color = "orange",    linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1114, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 0.5) +
    # Target labels
    annotate("text", x = min(combined_enrollment$week, na.rm = TRUE),
             y = 372  + 18, label = "25% target (n=372)",   color = "red",       hjust = 0, size = 3) +
    annotate("text", x = min(combined_enrollment$week, na.rm = TRUE),
             y = 743  + 18, label = "50% target (n=743)",   color = "orange",    hjust = 0, size = 3) +
    annotate("text", x = min(combined_enrollment$week, na.rm = TRUE),
             y = 1114 + 18, label = "75% target (n=1,114)", color = "darkgreen", hjust = 0, size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = all_colors) +
    scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%b %Y") +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    facet_wrap(~ arm_random, ncol = 1) +
    labs(
        title = "Enrollment Trends by Study Arm",
        x     = "Date",
        y     = "Cumulative Enrollment",
        color = "Study Site"
    ) +
    consort_theme +
    guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2))

p1
```

\newpage

## 2.2 Enrollment Progress - Per Facility

```{r Facility target reached, echo=F}
reached_25per_target <- weekly_enrollment %>%
  group_by(study_site) %>%
  summarise(latest_enrollment = max(cumulative_enrollment, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(latest_enrollment >= 37) %>%
  summarise(n = n()) %>%
  pull(n)

reached_50per_target <- weekly_enrollment %>%
  group_by(study_site) %>%
  summarise(latest_enrollment = max(cumulative_enrollment, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(latest_enrollment >= 74) %>%
  summarise(n = n()) %>%
  pull(n)

reached_75per_target <- weekly_enrollment %>%
  group_by(study_site) %>%
  summarise(latest_enrollment = max(cumulative_enrollment, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(latest_enrollment >= 111) %>%
  summarise(n = n()) %>%
  pull(n)
```

All `r reached_25per_target` facilities have surpassed our first enrollment milestone, with more than 37 perinatal women enrolled per facility cluster - exceeding 25% of the overall target enrollment. All `r reached_50per_target` facilities have surpassed the 50% target of 74 enrollments, and `r reached_75per_target` facilities have surpassed the 75% target of 111 enrollments.

```{r enrollment_sub_facility, fig.width=12, fig.height=10, echo=FALSE}
# NOTE FOR WENWEN: Replace arm_random with arm_group in this plot chunk
# below to switch from dummy to real arm assignment.

p2 <- ggplot(weekly_enrollment,
             aes(x = week, y = cumulative_enrollment,
                 color = study_site, group = study_site)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    # Target lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = 37,  linetype = "dashed", color = "red",       linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 74,  linetype = "dashed", color = "orange",    linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 111, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 0.5) +
    # Target labels
    annotate("text", x = min(weekly_enrollment$week, na.rm = TRUE),
             y = 37  + 3, label = "25% target (n=37)",  color = "red",       hjust = 0, size = 3) +
    annotate("text", x = min(weekly_enrollment$week, na.rm = TRUE),
             y = 74  + 3, label = "50% target (n=74)",  color = "orange",    hjust = 0, size = 3) +
    annotate("text", x = min(weekly_enrollment$week, na.rm = TRUE),
             y = 111 + 3, label = "75% target (n=111)", color = "darkgreen", hjust = 0, size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
    scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%b %Y") +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    facet_wrap(~ arm_random, ncol = 1) +
    labs(
        title = "Enrollment Trends by Facility",
        x     = "Date",
        y     = "Cumulative Enrollment",
        color = "Study Site"
    ) +
    consort_theme +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +
    guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2))

p2
```

\newpage

# 3. Women Living with HIV Cohort

```{r wlwh prep, echo=FALSE}
n_enrolled <- consort_data %>% filter(rct_enrolling == "Yes") %>% nrow()

# Identify WLWH and merge into consort_data
hiv <- ppw_rct_df %>% 
    filter(med_pastdiag___2 == "Checked") %>% 
    select(clt_ptid) %>% 
    mutate(WLWH = "Yes")

consort_data <- consort_data %>% 
    left_join(hiv, by = c("partipant_id" = "clt_ptid"))

# WLWH counts
n_hiv <- consort_data %>% filter(WLWH == "Yes") %>% nrow()

six_weeks     <- consort_data %>% filter(WLWH == "Yes", secondvisit == "Yes") %>% nrow()
fourteen_weeks <- consort_data %>% filter(WLWH == "Yes", thirdvisit  == "Yes") %>% nrow()
six_months    <- consort_data %>% filter(WLWH == "Yes", fourthvisit == "Yes") %>% nrow()
```

Overall `r n_enrolled` participants have been enrolled into the study, of which `r n_hiv` women are living with HIV (WLHIV), accounting to `r round(n_hiv/n_enrolled*100, 1)`% of total enrollments. Of these, `r six_weeks` (`r round(six_weeks/n_hiv *100,1 )`%) have completed their 6 weeks, `r fourteen_weeks` (`r round(fourteen_weeks/n_hiv*100,1)`%) have completed 14 weeks, and `r six_months` (`r round(six_months/n_hiv*100,1)`%) have completed their 6 months postpartum follow-up visits. 

```{r consort_WLWHIV, echo=FALSE, fig.height=10, fig.width = 15, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# NOTE FOR WENWEN: Replace arm_random with arm in this chunk
# to switch from dummy to real arm assignment.

counts_by_arm <- consort_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(arm_random)) %>%
    group_by(arm_random) %>%
    summarise(
        assessed             = n(),
        excluded             = sum(!is.na(exclusion)),
        eligible             = sum(eligible == "1", na.rm = TRUE),
        enrolled             = sum(rct_enrolling == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        hiv                  = sum(WLWH == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        pm_participants      = sum(ipmh_participant == "Yes" & WLWH == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        tele_participants    = sum(tele == "Yes" & WLWH == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        six_weeks_visit      = sum(secondvisit == "Yes" & WLWH == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        fourteen_weeks_visit = sum(thirdvisit  == "Yes" & WLWH == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        six_months_visit     = sum(fourthvisit == "Yes" & WLWH == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
        txt_eligible          = generate_stage_text("Eligible",                  eligible,             assessed),
        txt_excluded          = generate_stage_text("Excluded",                  excluded,             assessed),
        txt_enrolled          = generate_stage_text("Enrolled",                  enrolled,             eligible),
        txt_hiv               = generate_stage_text("HIV+ (WLWH)",              hiv,                  enrolled),
        txt_pm                = generate_stage_text("PM+",                       pm_participants,      hiv),
        txt_tele              = generate_stage_text("Telepsychiatry",            tele_participants,    hiv),
        txt_6weeks_postpartum  = generate_stage_text("6 weeks postpartum visit",  six_weeks_visit,      hiv),
        txt_14weeks_postpartum = generate_stage_text("14 weeks postpartum visit", fourteen_weeks_visit, hiv),
        txt_6months_postpartum = generate_stage_text("6 months postpartum visit", six_months_visit,     hiv),
        txt_pm_tele           = paste(txt_pm, txt_tele, sep = "\n")
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

txt_arm <- counts_by_arm %>%
    mutate(txt = sprintf("%s\n (n=%d, %.1f%%)",
                         arm_random, assessed, (assessed / n_assessed) * 100)) %>%
    pull(txt)

# Exclusion side boxes
txt_ex <- consort_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(exclusion)) %>%
    group_by(arm_random, exclusion) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(counts_by_arm %>% select(arm_random, excluded, assessed),
              by = "arm_random") %>%
    make_side_box(
        reason_var = "exclusion", count_var = "count",
        header_fn  = function(n, d) generate_box_header("Excluded", n, d),
        n_col = "excluded", denom_col = "assessed"
    )

# Decline side boxes
txt_decline <- consort_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(rct_decline_reason)) %>%
    group_by(arm_random, rct_decline_reason) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    left_join(
        counts_by_arm %>%
            mutate(declined = eligible - enrolled) %>%
            select(arm_random, declined, eligible),
        by = "arm_random"
    ) %>%
    make_side_box(
        reason_var = "rct_decline_reason", count_var = "count",
        header_fn  = function(n, d) sprintf("Declined Enrollment (n=%d, %.1f%%):", n, (n/d)*100),
        n_col = "declined", denom_col = "eligible"
    )

consort_wlwh <- add_box(txt = txt_anc) |>
    add_box(txt = txt_ass) |>
    add_split(txt = txt_arm) |>
    add_side_box(txt = txt_ex) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_eligible) |>
    add_side_box(txt = txt_decline) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_enrolled) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_hiv) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_6weeks_postpartum) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_14weeks_postpartum) |>
    add_box(txt = counts_by_arm$txt_6months_postpartum)

consort_wlwh
```

\newpage

# 4. Ineligibility

Women were ineligible if their gestational age at eligibility assessment was \<20 weeks, if they endorsed thoughts/actions of self-harm, and if they endorsed symptoms of potential psychosis (e.g., hearing voices that others cannot hear, holding unusual beliefs, or feeling watched/followed), or if they endorsed experiencing memory problems.

```{r ineligibility, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# NOTE FOR WENWEN: Replace arm_random with arm in this plot chunk
# below to switch from dummy to real arm assignment.

arm_ineligibility_summary <- consort_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(exclusion)) %>%
    tbl_summary(
        by      = arm_random,
        sort    = list(all_categorical() ~ "frequency"),
        include = exclusion,
        label   = list(exclusion ~ "Reasons for Ineligibility")
    ) %>%
    bold_labels() %>%
    add_overall() %>%
    as_kable_extra(
        caption  = "Summary of Study Ineligibility by Arm",
        booktabs = TRUE
    ) %>%
    kable_styling(
        font_size         = 10,
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
        full_width        = FALSE,
        position          = "center"
    )

arm_ineligibility_summary
```

\newpage

# 5. Baseline Demographics

## 5.1 Participant Baseline Demographics

Demographic characteristics were balanced across study arms, supporting baseline comparability.

```{r demographics prep, warning=F}
# NOTE FOR WENWEN: Replace arm_random with arm_group throughout the demo chunks
# below to switch from dummy to real arm assignment.

demographics_df <- ppw_rct_df %>% 
    filter(clt_visit == "Enrollment") %>% 
    select(clt_study_site, clt_date,starts_with("dem_"), demographics_complete, med_pre_preg, 
           med_pastdiag___2)%>% 
    mutate(dem_age = if_else(
        dem_dob_uk == "Yes",
        floor(time_length(interval(dem_dob, clt_date), "years")),
        dem_age
    ),
    # dem_current_partner = recode(dem_current_partner,
    #                              "Yes" = 1,
    #                              "No" = 0,
    #                              ),
    dem_maritalstat = ifelse(dem_maritalstat == "Currently married", 1, 0),
    dem_marriage = ifelse(dem_marriage == "Monogamous", 1, 
                          ifelse(is.na(dem_marriage), NA, 0)),
    dem_employment = recode(dem_employment,
                            `Prefer not to answer` = "Yes"),
    dem_pc_residence = recode(dem_pc_residence,
                              "Yes (Ndio) [Kamano]" = "Yes",
                              "No (La) [Ooyo]" = "No",
                              "Prefer not to answer (Singependa kujibu) [Ok daher mar duoko penjo ni]" = "Prefer not to answer")
    )%>%
    mutate(arm = stringr::str_extract(clt_study_site,"^\\d{2}"),
           arm_group = ifelse(arm %in% c("02","05", "06", "08", "11", "14", "15", "18", "20", "21"),
                              "Control", "Intervention"))

demographic_arms <- demographics_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(clt_study_site)) %>%
    distinct(clt_study_site) %>%
    arrange(clt_study_site) %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = sample(rep(c("Intervention (Randomized)",
                                  "Control (Randomized)"), each = 10))
    )

demographics_df <- demographics_df %>%
    left_join(demographic_arms, by = "clt_study_site") %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = factor(arm_random,
                            levels = c("Control (Randomized)",
                                       "Intervention (Randomized)"))
    )

arm_demo <- demographics_df %>%
    tbl_summary(by = arm_random, 
        sort = list(all_categorical() ~ "frequency"),  # Sort categorical levels by frequency in descending order
        include=c(dem_age, dem_current_partner, dem_maritalstat,
                  dem_marriage, dem_pc_residence, dem_current_school, dem_school, 
                  dem_employment, dem_household_num, dem_housesleep, 
                  dem_houserooms,dem_traveltime_min, med_pre_preg),
        label = list(dem_age ~ "Age (Years)",
                     dem_current_partner ~ "Do you currently have a partner",
                     dem_employment ~ "Do you have regular employment (Yes)",
                     dem_maritalstat ~ "Currently Married (Yes)",
                     dem_pc_residence ~ "Shares residence with partner (Yes)",
                     dem_marriage ~ "Marriage (Monogamous)",
                     dem_current_school ~ "Currently in School",
                     dem_school ~ "Completed years in School",
                     dem_household_num ~ "Number of people in Household",
                     dem_housesleep ~ "Number of people sleep in same house",
                     dem_houserooms ~ "Rooms in the house most often sleep in",
                     dem_traveltime_min ~ "Time to the Clinic (Minutes)",
                     med_pre_preg ~ "Have you been pregnant before (Yes)"),
        missing = "no",
        digits = list(
            all_continuous() ~ 1,       # continuous variables ??? 1 d.p.
            all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1) # categorical ??? 0 decimals for n, 1 d.p. for %
        ), 
        type = list(dem_age ~ "continuous", 
                    dem_household_num ~ "continuous",
                    dem_housesleep ~ "continuous", 
                    dem_houserooms ~ "continuous", 
                    dem_traveltime_min ~ "continuous"),
        statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} [IQR: {p25}, {p75}]")) %>% 
    bold_labels() %>%
    #add_p() %>% 
    add_overall(last = TRUE) %>% 
     bold_labels() %>%
    add_n() %>%
    as_kable_extra(
    caption  = "Basic Demographic Summary",
        booktabs = TRUE)

arm_demo %>% 
    kable_styling(
        font_size         = 10,
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "scale_down"),
        full_width        = FALSE,
        position          = "center")
   
```

\newpage

## 5.2 WLWH Cohort Baseline Demographics

Demographic characteristics were balanced across study arms, supporting baseline comparability.

```{r WLWH_demo, echo=FALSE}
# source("PPW RCT Basic Demographics.R")
arm_wlwh_demo <- demographics_df %>% 
    filter(med_pastdiag___2 == "Checked") %>% 
    tbl_summary(by = arm_random,
        sort = list(all_categorical() ~ "frequency"),  # Sort categorical levels by frequency in descending order
        include=c(dem_age, dem_current_partner, dem_maritalstat,
                  dem_marriage, dem_pc_residence, dem_current_school, dem_school, 
                  dem_employment, dem_household_num, dem_housesleep, 
                  dem_houserooms,dem_traveltime_min, med_pre_preg),
        label = list(dem_age ~ "Age (Years)",
                     dem_current_partner ~ "Do you currently have a partner (Yes)",
                     dem_employment ~ "Do you have regular employment (Yes)",
                     dem_maritalstat ~ "Currently Married (Yes)",
                     dem_pc_residence ~ "Shares residence with partner (Yes)",
                     dem_marriage ~ "Marriage (Monogamous)",
                     dem_current_school ~ "Currently in School",
                     dem_school ~ "Completed years in School",
                     dem_household_num ~ "Number of people in Household",
                     dem_housesleep ~ "Number of people sleep in same house",
                     dem_houserooms ~ "Rooms in the house most often sleep in",
                     dem_traveltime_min ~ "Time to the Clinic (Minutes)",
                     med_pre_preg ~ "Have you been pregnant before (Yes)"),
        missing = "no",
        digits = list(all_continuous() ~ 1), 
        type = list(dem_age ~ "continuous", 
                    dem_household_num ~ "continuous",
                    dem_housesleep ~ "continuous", 
                    dem_houserooms ~ "continuous", 
                    dem_traveltime_min ~ "continuous"),
        statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} [IQR: {p25}, {p75}]")) %>% 
    bold_labels() %>%
    #add_p() %>% 
    add_overall(last = TRUE) %>% 
     bold_labels() %>%
    add_n() %>%
    as_kable_extra(
    caption  = "WLWH Demographic Summary",
        booktabs = TRUE)

arm_wlwh_demo %>% 
    kable_styling(
        font_size         = 10,
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "scale_down"),
        full_width        = FALSE,
        position          = "center")
```

\newpage

# 6. Study Terminations

```{r Ealiest Expected termination}
first_6ths <- ppw_rct_df %>%
    # Filter to "6 months" and grab the first per participant
  filter(clt_visit == "6 months post-partum") %>%
    mutate(
    clt_timestamp = as_date(clt_date, format = "%Y-%m-%d")) %>% 
  group_by(clt_ptid) %>%
  slice_min(clt_date, n = 1) %>%    # in case there are duplicates
  ungroup() %>% 
    select(clt_study_site,clt_ptid, clt_date)

# First six-month visit date across participants
earliest_due <- first_6ths %>%
  slice_min(clt_date, n = 1) %>%
  select(clt_ptid, clt_date) %>% 
    pull(clt_date) 

total_exits <- ppw_rct_df%>%
    # Filter to "6 weeks" and grab the first per participant
  filter(clt_visit == "6 months post-partum") %>%
    mutate(arm = stringr::str_extract(clt_study_site,"^\\d{2}"),
           arm_group = ifelse(arm %in% c("02","05", "06", "08", "11", "14", "15", "18", "20", "21"),
                              "Control", "Intervention")) 

# Random arm generation
exits_arm <- total_exits %>%
    filter(!is.na(clt_study_site)) %>%
    distinct(clt_study_site) %>%
    arrange(clt_study_site) %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = sample(rep(c("Intervention (Randomized)",
                                  "Control (Randomized)"), each = 10))
    )
# Assign exit_arm to total exits
total_exits <- total_exits%>%
    left_join(exits_arm, by = "clt_study_site") %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = factor(arm_random,
                            levels = c("Control (Randomized)",
                                       "Intervention (Randomized)"))
    )

completed_follow_up <- total_exits %>% 
    filter(clt_visit=="6 months post-partum") %>% 
    nrow()

completed_follow_upX <- total_exits %>% 
    filter(arm_random == "Control (Randomized)") %>% 
    select(clt_ptid, clt_visit) %>% 
    filter(clt_visit=="6 months post-partum") %>%
    nrow()
    
completed_follow_upY <- total_exits %>% 
    filter(arm_random == "Intervention (Randomized)") %>% 
    select(clt_ptid, clt_visit) %>% 
    filter(clt_visit=="6 months post-partum") %>% 
    nrow()

```

To date, we have not recorded any early terminations. However, `r completed_follow_up` participants have exited the study as scheduled at the end of follow-up. The first termination occurred on `r earliest_due`. Of which, `r completed_follow_upX` and `r completed_follow_upY` were from the control and intervention arm, respectively. 


\newpage

# 7. Referrals

## 7.1 Psychosocial Referrals

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
source("PPW RCT Referrals.R")

total_visits <- referral_df %>%nrow()
total_scr_num <- df_long %>% nrow()
total_scr_per <- round(total_scr_num/total_visits *100, 1)
total_ref_num <- df_long %>% filter(referral_accept == "Yes") %>% nrow()
total_ref_per <- round(total_ref_num/total_scr_num *100, 1)

```


During enrollment and follow-up visits participants are asked if they would like to be referred for psychosocial support if they screen positive for depression, anxiety and intimate partner violence (IPV). Out of `r total_visits` total study visits, `r total_scr_num` (`r total_scr_per`%) participants have screened positive for  referable conditions, of which, `r total_ref_num` (`r total_ref_per`%) have accepted referrals.


```{r referrals, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
## generate report using data from psychosocial referrals form in REDCap  
# source("PPW RCT Referrals.R")

arm_referral_summary
```


## 7.2 Treatment Referrals

```{r treatment_referrals_numsource, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("Telepsychiatry Sessions.R")
# Summarise ANC attendees and extract the sum as a numeric value
Attendees <- daily_closeout_df %>%
    summarise(`anc attendees` = sum(rct_anc_number, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    pull(`anc attendees`)  # Extract the sum value as a number
```

During this study period, `r Attendees` women attended MCH in the study clinics and were screened for PMAD symptoms, of whom `r screened_pmad` (`r round(screened_pmad / Attendees *100,1)`%) screened positive for PMAD. Among these, `r PM_referrals`(`r round (PM_referrals / screened_pmad *100,1)`%) had moderate symptoms in either PHQ9 or GAD7 and were referred to PM+, and `r telep_referrals` (`r round (telep_referrals / screened_pmad * 100,1)`%) had severe symptoms and were referred to a psychiatrist.


```{r treatment_referrals, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# source("Telepsychiatry Sessions.R")
#Generate a table/figure depicting stepped care intervention steps ???Screening,  PM+,  telepsychiatry tracking (kind of ???fidelity??? to intervention model) 
fidelity_summary

```

# 8. Primary and secondary study endpoints at 14 weeks postpartum

```{r Outcome summary source, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
## PHQ9, GAD7, WHOQOL BREF score 
outcomes <- ppw_rct_df %>%
    mutate(
        visit_type = case_when(
            grepl("Enrollment", redcap_event_name) ~ "Enrollment",
            grepl("6 Weeks", redcap_event_name) ~ "6 Weeks",
            grepl("14 Weeks", redcap_event_name) ~ "14 Weeks", 
            grepl("6 Months", redcap_event_name) ~ "6 Months",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
        ),
        arm = case_when(
            grepl("Arm 1: Intervention", redcap_event_name) ~ "Intervention",
            grepl("Arm 2: Control", redcap_event_name) ~ "Control",
            TRUE ~ "Unknown"
        )) %>% 
  select(visit_type, clt_ptid, all_of(starts_with("phq_")),
         all_of(starts_with("gad7_")), all_of(starts_with("qol_"))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(clt_ptid))

## PHQ9 & GAD7 scores

outcomes <- outcomes %>%
  mutate(across(c(starts_with("phq_")),
                ~ case_when(
                  . == "not at all" ~ 0,
                  . == "several days" ~ 1,
                  . == "more than half the days" ~ 2,
                  . == "nearly every day" ~ 3,
                  TRUE ~ NA_real_
                ),
                .names = "{.col}_number")) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("gad7_"),
                ~ case_when(
                  . == "Not at all" ~ 0,
                  . == "Several days" ~ 1,
                  . == "Over half the days" ~ 2,
                  . == "Nearly every day" ~ 3,
                  TRUE ~ NA_real_
                ),
                .names = "{.col}_number")) %>%
  mutate(
    phq9_total = rowSums(select(., starts_with("phq_") & ends_with("_number")), na.rm = TRUE),
    gad7_total = rowSums(select(., starts_with("gad7_") & ends_with("_number")), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    phq9_high = ifelse(phq9_total >= 10, "Yes", "No"),
    gad7_high = ifelse(gad7_total >= 10, "Yes", "No")
  )

## WHOQOL BREF

outcomes <- outcomes %>%
  mutate(qol_rate_number = case_when(
    qol_rate == "Very poor" ~ 1,
    qol_rate == "Poor" ~ 2,
    qol_rate == "Neither poor nor good" ~ 3,
    qol_rate == "Good" ~ 4,
    qol_rate == "Very good" ~ 5,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>%
  mutate(qol_sat_number = case_when(
    qol_sat == "Very dissatisfied" ~ 1,
    qol_sat == "Dissatisfied" ~ 2,
    qol_sat == "Neither satisfied nor dissatisfied" ~ 3,
    qol_sat == "Satisfied" ~ 4,
    qol_sat == "Very satisfied" ~ 5,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>%
  mutate(across(c(qol_enjoy, qol_mean),
                ~ case_when(
                  . == "Not at all" ~ 1,
                  . == "A little" ~ 2,
                  . == "A moderate amount" ~ 3,
                  . == "Very much" ~ 4,
                  . == "An extreme amount" ~ 5,
                  TRUE ~ NA_real_
                ),
                .names = "{.col}_number")) %>%
  mutate(across(c(qol_medtreat, qol_pain),
                ~ case_when(
                  . == "Not at all" ~ 5,
                  . == "A little" ~ 4,
                  . == "A moderate amount" ~ 3,
                  . == "Very much" ~ 2,
                  . == "An extreme amount" ~ 1,
                  TRUE ~ NA_real_
                ),
                .names = "{.col}_number")) %>%
  mutate(across(c(qol_conc, qol_safe, qol_env),
                ~ case_when(
                  . == "Not at all" ~ 1,
                  . == "A little" ~ 2,
                  . == "A moderate amount" ~ 3,
                  . == "Very much" ~ 4,
                  . == "Extremely" ~ 5,
                  TRUE ~ NA_real_
                ),
                .names = "{.col}_number")) %>%
  mutate(across(c(qol_energy, qol_bod, qol_money, qol_info, qol_leis),
                ~ case_when(
                  . == "Not at all" ~ 1,
                  . == "A little" ~ 2,
                  . == "Moderately" ~ 3,
                  . == "Mostly" ~ 4,
                  . == "Completely" ~ 5,
                  TRUE ~ NA_real_
                ),
                .names = "{.col}_number")) %>%
  mutate(qol_get_number = case_when(
    qol_get == "Very poor" ~ 1,
    qol_get == "Poor" ~ 2,
    qol_get == "Neither poor nor good" ~ 3,
    qol_get == "Good" ~ 4,
    qol_get == "Very good" ~ 5,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>%
  mutate(across(c(qol_sleep, qol_perf, qol_cap, qol_self, qol_rel, qol_sex,
                  qol_sup, qol_con, qol_serv, qol_trans),
                ~ case_when(
                  . == "Very dissatisfied" ~ 1,
                  . == "Dissatisfied" ~ 2,
                  . == "Neither satisfied nor dissatisfied" ~ 3,
                  . == "Satisfied" ~ 4,
                  . == "Very satisfied" ~ 5,
                  TRUE ~ NA_real_
                ),
                .names = "{.col}_number")) %>%
  mutate(qol_blue_number = case_when(
    qol_blue == "Never" ~ 5,
    qol_blue == "Seldom" ~ 4,
    qol_blue == "Quite often" ~ 3,
    qol_blue == "Very often" ~ 2,
    qol_blue == "Always" ~ 1,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  ))

# Calculate WHOQOL BREF scores

outcomes <- outcomes %>%
  mutate(
    qol_overall = qol_rate_number + qol_sat_number,
    qol_physical = qol_pain_number + qol_medtreat_number + qol_energy_number + qol_get_number +
      qol_sleep_number + qol_perf_number + qol_cap_number,
    qol_psycho = qol_enjoy_number + qol_mean_number + qol_conc_number + qol_bod_number +
      qol_self_number + qol_blue_number,
    qol_social = qol_rel_number + qol_sex_number + qol_sup_number,
    qol_environ = qol_safe_number + qol_env_number + qol_money_number + qol_info_number +
      qol_leis_number + qol_con_number + qol_trans_number + qol_serv_number
  )

# Define item vectors

physical_items <- c("qol_pain_number", "qol_medtreat_number", "qol_energy_number",
                    "qol_get_number", "qol_sleep_number", "qol_perf_number", "qol_cap_number")

psych_items <- c("qol_enjoy_number", "qol_mean_number", "qol_conc_number",
                 "qol_bod_number", "qol_self_number", "qol_blue_number")

social_items <- c("qol_rel_number", "qol_sex_number", "qol_sup_number")

env_items <- c("qol_safe_number", "qol_env_number", "qol_money_number",
               "qol_info_number", "qol_leis_number", "qol_con_number",
               "qol_trans_number", "qol_serv_number")

# Imputation

outcomes <- outcomes %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    physical_non_missing = sum(!is.na(c_across(all_of(physical_items)))),
    qol_physical = ifelse(
      physical_non_missing >= 6,
      sum(replace_na(c_across(all_of(physical_items)),
                     mean(c_across(all_of(physical_items)), na.rm = TRUE)), na.rm = TRUE),
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

outcomes <- outcomes %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    env_non_missing = sum(!is.na(c_across(all_of(env_items)))),
    qol_environ = ifelse(
      env_non_missing >= 7,
      sum(replace_na(c_across(all_of(env_items)),
                     mean(c_across(all_of(env_items)), na.rm = TRUE)), na.rm = TRUE),
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

outcomes <- outcomes %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    qol_psycho = ifelse(any(is.na(c_across(all_of(psych_items)))), NA_real_,
                        sum(c_across(all_of(psych_items)))),
    qol_social = ifelse(any(is.na(c_across(all_of(social_items)))), NA_real_,
                        sum(c_across(all_of(social_items))))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

outcomes <- outcomes %>%
  mutate(
    qol_physical_scaled = ((qol_physical - 7) / 28) * 100,
    qol_psycho_scaled = ((qol_psycho - 6) / 24) * 100,
    qol_social_scaled = ((qol_social - 3) / 12) * 100,
    qol_environ_scaled = ((qol_environ - 8) / 32) * 100,
    qol_overall_scaled = ((qol_overall - 2) / 8) * 100
  )

outcomes <- outcomes %>%
  mutate(visit_type = factor(visit_type,
                             levels = c("Enrollment", "6 Weeks", "14 Weeks", "6 Months")))

```


\newpage
# 9. Adverse Events

## 9.1 Serious Adverse Event Summary

```{r Summary of SAEs}
sae_df <- ppw_sae_df %>% 
    select(record_id, redcap_repeat_instance, starts_with("ae_"), redcap_event_name) %>% 
    
    filter(ae_yn == "Yes" & str_detect(ae_cat, "SAE"))

clean_sae_df <- sae_df %>%
    mutate(ae_cat = case_when(
        record_id == "21031003" & ae_cat == "New/prolonged hospitalization (SAE)" ~ "Infant Death (SAE)",
        ae_cat == "Miscarriage or stillbirth (loss of pregnancy) (SAE)" ~ "Stillbirth (SAE)",
        ae_type___1 == "Checked" ~ "Maternal Death (SAE)",
        ae_type___2 == "Checked" ~ "Infant Death (SAE)",
        TRUE ~ ae_cat
    )) %>%
    group_by(ae_cat) %>%
    rename(Event = ae_cat) %>%
    mutate(Event = str_remove(Event, fixed("(SAE)")))

set.seed(12345)

sae_arm <- clean_sae_df %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(!is.na(redcap_event_name)) %>%
  distinct(redcap_event_name) %>%
  arrange(redcap_event_name) %>%
  mutate(
    arm_random = sample(
      c("Intervention (Randomized)",
        "Control (Randomized)"),
      size = n(),
      replace = TRUE
    )
  )

# Assign sae_arm to clean saes
clean_sae_df <- clean_sae_df %>%
    mutate(Arm = case_when(
        grepl("Arm 2: Control",redcap_event_name) ~ "Control",
        grepl("Arm 1: Intervention", redcap_event_name) ~ "Intervention",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )) %>% 
    left_join(sae_arm, by = "redcap_event_name") %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = factor(arm_random,
                            levels = c("Control (Randomized)",
                                       "Intervention (Randomized)"))
    ) %>% 
    mutate(
        death_type = case_when(
            ae_type___1 == "Checked" ~ "Maternal Death",
            ae_type___2 == "Checked" ~ "Infant Death",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
    )

deaths <- clean_sae_df %>%
    filter(ae_type___1 == "Checked"|ae_type___2 == "Checked") %>%
    select(record_id, Event, death_type, ae_narrative)

# Convert to flextable
death_tbl <- flextable(deaths)

# --- IMPORTANT FIXES FOR LONG TEXT ----
# Wrap text
# Apply to all columns by names

death_tbl <- valign(death_tbl, j = seq_along(death_tbl$col_keys), valign = "top")
death_tbl <- align(death_tbl, j = seq_along(death_tbl$col_keys), align = "left")
death_tbl <- height_all(death_tbl, height = 1)
death_tbl <- autofit(death_tbl)

# Set specific max widths (A4 width after margins is approx 6.5 inches)
death_tbl <- width(death_tbl, j = "record_id", width = 1)
death_tbl <- width(death_tbl, j = "Event", width = 1.5)
death_tbl <- width(death_tbl, j = "death_type", width = 1.3)
death_tbl <- width(death_tbl, j = "ae_narrative", width = 4.5)  # main text column

# Coding the causes of deaths
clean_sae_df <- clean_sae_df %>%
    mutate(
        infant_cause_category =  case_when(
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("milk.*nose|milk.*mouth|foam.*mouth|foam.*nose|frothing|choking|aspiration", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Respiratory failure / Aspiration",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("vomiting blood|gastrointestinal bleeding|peptic ulcer", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Gastrointestinal bleeding / Peptic ulcer complications",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("breathing|respiratory|asphyxia", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Respiratory complications",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("infection|sepsis", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Infection / Sepsis",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("hemorrhage|bleeding", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Hemorrhage",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("fever|vomiting", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Fever/Vomiting",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("congenital|malformation|birth defect|imperforate anus|hand anomaly", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Congenital malformations / Birth defects",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("without signs of active movements| nor did she cry at birth|no movements|did not cry|apnea at birth|stillborn", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Birth asphyxia / Intrapartum hypoxia",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("due to prolonged labour|well specialised care and admitted to the NBU", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Birth asphyxia secondary to prolonged labor",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("low birth weight|had a pre term birth", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Prematurity",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") & str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("gestation period of 39 weeks at 4.00am", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Still birth",
            (death_type == "Infant Death") ~ "Other / Unknown",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_   # keep cause_of_death as NA if death_type is NA
        ),
        maternal_cause_category = case_when(
            death_type == "Maternal Death" &
                str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("peptic ulcer|peptic ulcers|peptic ulcer disease|gastrointestinal bleeding|GI bleed|hematemesis", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Gastrointestinal bleeding",

            death_type == "Maternal Death" &
                str_detect(ae_narrative, regex("abdominal pain.*(emergency|urgent)|intraoperative|cesarean", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
                "Intraoperative complication during CS",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
    )


# Step 2: Create a binary variable for each Event category
sae_wide <- clean_sae_df %>%
    mutate(event_flag = 1) %>%  # to allow counting
    select(record_id, death_type, arm_random, Arm, Event, event_flag, infant_cause_category,
           maternal_cause_category) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Event, values_from = event_flag, values_fill = 0) %>%
    select(-record_id)

sae_wide <- sae_wide %>%
    relocate(death_type, .after = "Infant Death ")

sae_summary_arm <- sae_wide %>%
    tbl_summary(
        by = arm_random,
        include = c(
            "Maternal Death ",
            "Infant Death ",
            "death_type",
            "infant_cause_category",
            "maternal_cause_category",
            "Stillbirth ",
            "New/prolonged hospitalization "
        ),
        type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous",
        statistic = all_continuous() ~ "{sum}",
        percent = "cell",
        missing = "no",
        digits = list(
            all_continuous() ~ 1,       # continuous variables ??? 1 d.p.
            all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1) # categorical ??? 0 decimals for n, 1 d.p. for %
        ),
        label = list(
            death_type = "Death Classification",
            infant_cause_category = "Infants Death Cause",
            maternal_cause_category = "Maternal Death Cause"),
        sort = list(all_categorical() ~ "frequency")# Sort categorical levels by frequency in descending order
    ) %>%
    bold_labels() %>%
    add_overall(last = TRUE) %>% 
    as_kable_extra(caption  = "Summary of Reported Serious Adverse Events by Arm",
                   booktabs = TRUE)


sae_summary_arm %>% 
    kable_styling(font_size         = 10,
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "scale_down"),
                  full_width        = FALSE,
                  position          = "center")

```

## 9.2 Adverse Event Summary

```{r ae_summary_morcohort, echo=FALSE}
ae_df <- ppw_sae_df %>%
    mutate(
        visit_type = case_when(
            grepl("Enrollment", redcap_event_name) ~ "Enrollment",
            grepl("6 Weeks", redcap_event_name) ~ "6 Weeks",
            grepl("14 Weeks", redcap_event_name) ~ "14 Weeks", 
            grepl("6 Months", redcap_event_name) ~ "6 Months",
            TRUE ~ NA_character_
        ),
        arm = case_when(
            grepl("Arm 1: Intervention", redcap_event_name) ~ "Intervention",
            grepl("Arm 2: Control", redcap_event_name) ~ "Control",
            TRUE ~ "Unknown"
        ))%>% 
    filter(ae_yn == "Yes" & !str_detect(ae_cat, "SAE"))%>% 
    select(record_id, redcap_repeat_instance, 
           visit_type, redcap_event_name, 
           starts_with("ae_"),arm ) 

ae_define_map <- c(
    ae_define___1  = "Kicked out of home",
    ae_define___2  = "Experienced violence or abuse",
    ae_define___3  = "Breach of Confidentiality",
    ae_define___4  = "Self-harm/Suicidal behavior",
    ae_define___5  = "Persistent or significant psychosocial distress",
    ae_define___6  = "Infant harm/behavior",
    ae_define___99 = "Other"
)

set.seed(12345)

ae_arm <- ae_df %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(!is.na(record_id)) %>%
  distinct(record_id) %>%
  arrange(record_id) %>%
  mutate(
    arm_random = sample(
      c("Intervention (Randomized)",
        "Control (Randomized)"),
      size = n(),
      replace = TRUE
    )
  )

# Assign sae_arm to clean saes
ae_df <- ae_df %>% 
    left_join(ae_arm, by = "record_id") %>%
    mutate(
        arm_random = factor(arm_random,
                            levels = c("Control (Randomized)",
                                       "Intervention (Randomized)"))
    )

# ---- Social harms ----
ae_social_summary <- ae_df %>%
    filter(ae_cat == "Social harm event (includes: depression, anxiety, IPV, self-harm, infant harm, breach of confidentiality, etc.)") %>%
    filter(redcap_repeat_instance == 2 | !str_detect(redcap_event_name, "Enrollment")) %>%
    select(record_id, arm_random, names(ae_define_map)) %>%
    # To external analyst: Replace with arm for real data----
    pivot_longer(
        cols = names(ae_define_map),
        names_to = "variable",
        values_to = "checked"
    ) %>%
    filter(checked == "Checked") %>%
    mutate(Event = ae_define_map[variable]) %>%
    group_by(arm_random, Event) %>% # To external analyst: Replace with arm for real data----
    summarise(`Number of Events` = n(), .groups = "drop")

# ---- Injury ----
ae_injury_summary <- ae_df %>%
    filter(ae_cat == "Injury") %>%
    filter(redcap_repeat_instance == 2 | !str_detect(redcap_event_name, "Enrollment")) %>%
    group_by(arm_random, Event = ae_cat) %>% # To external analyst: Replace with arm for real data----
    summarise(`Number of Events` = n(), .groups = "drop")

# ---- Combine ----
ae_report_df <- bind_rows(ae_injury_summary, ae_social_summary)

# ---- Add percentages within arm ----
ae_report_df <- ae_report_df %>%
    group_by(arm_random) %>%
    mutate(
        Summary = sprintf(
            "%d (%.1f%%)",
            `Number of Events`,
            100 * `Number of Events` / sum(`Number of Events`)
        )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

# ---- Wide format (arms as columns) ----
ae_report_wide <- ae_report_df %>%
    select(Event, arm_random, Summary) %>% # To external analyst: Replace with arm for real data----
    pivot_wider(names_from = arm_random, values_from = Summary)

# ---- Add totals per arm ----
totals <- ae_report_df %>%
    group_by(arm_random) %>% # To external analyst: Replace with arm for real data----
    summarise(Summary = as.character(sum(`Number of Events`)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(Event = "Total") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = arm_random, values_from = Summary)

# ---- Final table ----
final_table <- bind_rows(ae_report_wide, totals)

# ---- Print ----
final_table %>%
    kable(caption = "Table: Summary of Adverse Events by Arm") %>% 
    kable_styling(
        font_size = 10,
        latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position", "scale_down"),
        full_width = FALSE,
        position = "left"
    )
```

### 9.2.1 List of Adverse Events: Control Arm

```{r ArmX_AEs, echo=FALSE, fig.height=9, fig.width=15, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#--------------------------------------------
# 1. Prepare AE dataset
#--------------------------------------------
ae_df <- ppw_sae_df %>% 
  select(record_id, redcap_repeat_instance, starts_with("ae_"), redcap_event_name) %>%
  filter(ae_yn == "Yes", !str_detect(ae_cat, "SAE"))

#--------------------------------------------
# 2. Labels
#--------------------------------------------
ae_labels <- c(
  ae_define___1  = "Kicked out of home",
  ae_define___2  = "Experienced violence or abuse",
  ae_define___3  = "Breach of Confidentiality",
  ae_define___4  = "Self-harm/Suicidal behavior",
  ae_define___5  = "Persistent or significant psychosocial distress",
  ae_define___6  = "Infant harm/behavior",
  ae_define___99 = "Other"
)

#--------------------------------------------
# 3. Social harm AEs
#--------------------------------------------
self_harm_df <- ae_df %>%
  filter(str_detect(ae_cat, "Social harm event")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("ae_define___"),
    names_to = "ae_type",
    values_to = "Checked"
  ) %>%
  filter(Checked == "Checked") %>%
  mutate(ae_label = recode(ae_type, !!!ae_labels))

#--------------------------------------------
# 4. Other AEs
#--------------------------------------------
other_ae <- ae_df %>%
  filter(!str_detect(ae_cat, "Social harm event")) %>%
  mutate(ae_label = ae_cat)

#--------------------------------------------
# 5. Combine AEs
#--------------------------------------------
final_ae <- bind_rows(self_harm_df, other_ae)

#--------------------------------------------
# 6. Assign random arms (by event name)
#--------------------------------------------
set.seed(12345)

ae_arm <- final_ae %>%
  filter(!is.na(redcap_event_name)) %>%
  distinct(redcap_event_name) %>%
  arrange(redcap_event_name) %>%
  mutate(
    arm_random = sample(
      c("Intervention (Randomized)",
        "Control (Randomized)"),
      size = n(),
      replace = TRUE
    )
  )

#--------------------------------------------
# 7. Attach arm + clean AE category
#--------------------------------------------
final_ae <- final_ae %>%
  mutate(
    Arm = str_extract(redcap_event_name, "(?<=Arm \\d: ).*")
  ) %>%
  left_join(ae_arm, by = "redcap_event_name") %>%
  mutate(
    ae_cat = forcats::fct_recode(
      ae_cat,
      "Social harm" = "Social harm event (includes: depression, anxiety, IPV, self-harm, infant harm, breach of confidentiality, etc.)"
    )
  )

#--------------------------------------------
# 8. Age dataset
#--------------------------------------------
ae_ages <- ppw_rct_df %>%
  mutate(
    dem_age = if_else(
      dem_dob_uk == "Yes",
      floor(lubridate::time_length(lubridate::interval(dem_dob, clt_date), "years")),
      dem_age
    )
  ) %>%
  select(record_id, clt_study_site, redcap_event_name, dem_age, clt_date) %>%
  filter(str_detect(redcap_event_name, "^Enrollment"), !is.na(clt_date))

#--------------------------------------------
# 9. Merge age + clean dates
#--------------------------------------------
final_ae <- final_ae %>%
  left_join(ae_ages, by = "record_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(dem_age)) %>%
  mutate(
    ae_datereport = as.Date(ae_datereport),
    ae_dateonset  = as.Date(ae_dateonset),
    clt_date      = as.Date(clt_date),
    reported_days = as.numeric(ae_datereport - ae_dateonset)
  )

#--------------------------------------------
# 10. Intervention AE summary
#--------------------------------------------
int_ae_summary <- final_ae %>%
  filter(arm_random == "Intervention (Randomized)") %>%
    # To external analyst: Replace with arm for real data----
  select(record_id, clt_study_site, ae_label, dem_age,
         ae_dateonset, ae_datereport, reported_days) %>%
  mutate(clt_study_site = str_remove(clt_study_site, "^[0-9]+,\\s*")) %>%
  rename(
    PTID = record_id,
    `Study Site` = clt_study_site,
    `Adverse Event reported` = ae_label,
    `Start date of adverse event` = ae_dateonset,
    `Date Adverse Event was reported` = ae_datereport,
    `Age of participant` = dem_age,
    `Days from Onset to Report` = reported_days
  )

#--------------------------------------------
# 11. Table output
#--------------------------------------------
int_ae_summary %>%
  kable(
    caption = "List of Study Adverse Events for Intervention",
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    font_size = 10,
    latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position", "scale_down"),
    full_width = FALSE,
    position = "left"
  )
```

### 9.2.2 List of Adverse Events: Intervention Arm

```{r ArmY_AEs, echo=FALSE, fig.height=9, fig.width=15, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
cont_ae_summary <- final_ae %>%
  filter(arm_random == "Control (Randomized)") %>%
    # To external analyst: Replace with arm for real data----
  select(record_id, clt_study_site, ae_label,
         dem_age, ae_dateonset, ae_datereport,
         reported_days) %>%
  mutate(clt_study_site = str_remove(clt_study_site, "^[0-9]+,\\s*")) %>%
  rename(
    PTID = record_id,
    `Study Site` = clt_study_site,
    `Adverse Event reported` = ae_label,
    `Start date of adverse event` = ae_dateonset,
    `Date Adverse Event was reported` = ae_datereport,
    `Age of participant` = dem_age,
    `Days from Onset to Report` = reported_days
  )

# Table output
cont_ae_summary %>%
  kable(
    caption = "List of Study Adverse Events for Control",
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    font_size = 10,
    latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position", "scale_down"),
    full_width = FALSE,
    position = "center"
  )
```
